message:
test(cve-arena): refresh bd-15n.2 / bd-18qq.4 / bd-1f35 result snapshots + flush beads

Mechanical refresh of the CVE-arena golden artifacts that capture each
deterministic harness run for the three currently-active beads:

- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-15n.2/{artifact_index.json, report.json,
  trace.jsonl}: harness-id and timing fields advance with the new
  run; trace events shift by 26 lines.
- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-18qq.4/{artifact_index.json, trace.jsonl,
  uaf_adversarial_detection.v1.json}: large refresh of the UAF
  adversarial detection batch (~2000 trace lines, ~1000 lines of
  detection JSON) reflecting the new fallback-table accounting from
  the malloc_abi raw_alloc/raw_free wiring (sibling commit).
- tests/cve_arena/results/bd-1f35/{artifact_index.json, report.json,
  trace.jsonl, hardened/{create_join_churn,fanout_fanin_single,
  mixed_detach_join}/std{err,out}.txt, strict/<same three>/
  std{err,out}.txt}: refreshed stderr/stdout captures and the
  artifact index after the rerun against the updated fallback table.

.beads/issues.jsonl flushes the companion beads task transitions.

No production code changes here; this commit is the snapshot-update
half of the d631e5c malloc_abi accounting change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
